parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, prediction: $json.prediction, status: $json.status, counts: $json.counts, whatsapp_message: $json.whatsapp_message } }}

nodes.name: Enviar WhatsApp
nodes.notes: Reemplaza TU_PHONE_NUMBER_ID y TU_ACCESS_TOKEN con los datos de Meta WhatsApp Cloud API antes de publicar.
